name: menufix
desc: Enable the four lobby menu buttons (NewChar/Lottery/Delete/Session) that scene 0x16 (FUN_0051a370) hardcodes disabled via the enable array [1,0,0,0,0,1,0,1]. Same-length imm8 00->01 at the four `mov byte [esp+disp],0` sites. Verified live (Task 1): clicking advances the new-character flow.
